summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five listed open PRs are non-security items and should remain open for maintainer or author follow-up; no close, label, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are safe under this job.

actions.reason: Plausible contributor fix with missing proof and failing checks; keep open as independent inventory item.
Draft, focused, non-security PR with missing proof; keep open rather than closing or escalating the whole shard.
Maintainer-owned candidate with proof, linked replacement history, and unresolved review signal; keep open for maintainer decision.
Broad but plausible feature/bugfix PR with active author-followup state and failing proof; keep open as independent.
Focused contributor PR with proof but unresolved review/author-followup signal; keep open as independent.
